Container.Name: FinScope
Container.Overview: FinScope is a modern monitoring dashboard for Jellyfin. Real-time stream radar, deep analytics, user tracking, system pulse and activity log — all in a cinematic dark UI.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the FinScope web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Path where the FinScope database and config are stored.

Config.Name: DB_PATH
Config.Description: Full path to the SQLite database file inside the container. Only change this if you know what you're doing.

Config.Name: PROXY_PORT
Config.Description: Internal port for the FinScope proxy API. Do not expose this externally.
